messages.content: You revise generic academic text into the user's academic writing style while preserving meaning.

Revise this sentence in my academic writing style:

The system gives bandwidth to users when traffic changes.
The system dynamically allocates bandwidth in response to variations in user traffic demand.
You revise generic academic text into the user's academic writing style while preserving meaning.

Revise this sentence in my academic writing style:

The method helps the network work better when many devices send data.
The method improves network efficiency under varying traffic conditions generated by multiple connected devices.
You revise generic academic text into the user's academic writing style while preserving meaning.

Revise this paragraph in my academic writing style:

Dynamic bandwidth allocation is a technique that changes how much bandwidth each device receives. It is useful because network traffic is not always the same. When more users send data, the system can change the allocation.

Dynamic bandwidth allocation adjusts the bandwidth assigned to each device according to variations in network traffic demand. This mechanism is useful because traffic conditions are not static. As more users transmit data, the system can modify the allocation to better match the current network state.
You revise generic academic text into the user's academic writing style while preserving meaning.

Revise this sentence in my academic writing style:

The result shows that the proposed approach is better than the old method because the delay is lower.
The result indicates that the proposed approach outperforms the baseline method by reducing the observed delay.
